executives.name: Jeffrey Bezos
executives.background: Jeffrey P. Bezos is the founder of Amazon and has served as Executive Chair since July 2021. He founded the company in 1994 and served as CEO from then until July 2021.

executives.name: Andrew Jassy
executives.background: Andrew R. Jassy has been President and CEO of Amazon since July 2021. He previously served as CEO of Amazon Web Services (AWS) from April 2016 to July 2021 and joined the company in 1997.

executives.name: Douglas Herrington
executives.background: Douglas J. Herrington has been CEO of Worldwide Amazon Stores since July 2022. He joined Amazon in 2005 and previously served as Senior Vice President, North America Consumer.

executives.name: Adam Selipsky
executives.background: Adam N. Selipsky was CEO of Amazon Web Services from May 2021 to June 2024. He previously served as President and CEO of Tableau Software.

executives.name: Brian Olsavsky
executives.background: Brian T. Olsavsky has been Senior Vice President and CFO since June 2015. He joined Amazon in 2002 and has held various financial leadership roles.

executives.name: David Zapolsky
executives.background: David A. Zapolsky has been Senior Vice President, Global Public Policy and General Counsel since 2023. He joined Amazon in 1999.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Global Public Policy and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Bezos
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Executive Chair of Amazon.com, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Jassy
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Amazon.com, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Keith Alexander
board_of_directors.background: Former Director of the National Security Agency and former Commander of U.S. Cyber Command.

board_of_directors.name: Edith Cooper
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder of Medley and former Global Head of Human Capital Management at Goldman Sachs.

board_of_directors.name: Jamie Gorelick
board_of_directors.background: Partner at Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr LLP and former Deputy Attorney General of the United States.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Huttenlocher
board_of_directors.background: Dean of the MIT Schwarzman College of Computing.

board_of_directors.name: Judith McGrath
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of MTV Networks.

board_of_directors.name: Indra Nooyi
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of PepsiCo, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jonathan Rubinstein
board_of_directors.background: Former co-CEO of Bridgewater Associates and former Senior Vice President at Apple Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Smith
board_of_directors.background: President of Marshall University and former Chairman and CEO of Intuit Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Patricia Stonesifer
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Martha's Table and former CEO of the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.

board_of_directors.name: Wendell Weeks
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Corning Incorporated.
